Subject: Exciting Virtual Roles with Cornell University’s Research Team
Body:
Dear Aspiring Scholars,

We are delighted to present you with unique online prospects for research and internships under the expert mentorship of Prof. <name> from our Sociology Department at Cornell University.

Join the Cornell Global Initiative Cornell Global has been at the forefront of advancing social and economic progress through pioneering research. We aim to assemble innovative thinkers passionate about making a significant impact.

Is our vision bold? Absolutely. The College of Arts & Sciences at Cornell consistently champions breakthrough initiatives, and you can be part of this esteemed tradition. Help us forge a luminous future.

Virtual Opportunities Cornell Global, along with our Research Division and Career Support, is offering virtual internships and research positions for driven, inquisitive individuals.

Roles include opportunities to:

- Engage in hands-on research experiences
- Collaborate online with expert mentors and peers
- Tackle real-world issues while honing analytical skills We invite you to cultivate excellence and creativity at Cornell.

Why Cornell? Research at Cornell drives transformation. Our cross-disciplinary teams constantly challenge the status quo to confront important local and global issues.

Ideas to Impact Working with innovators, government, and industry leaders, Cornell delivers remarkable research outcomes.

Position Details Role: Remote Research Assistant / Internship Division: College of Arts & Sciences Available to everyone in Cornell Global Eligibility - Open to both undergraduate and graduate applicants
- Welcomes applications from non-Cornell students
- Requires a computer and reliable internet
- Open to all disciplines and nationalities
- Flexible online schedule, ongoing availability Key Duties - Support faculty with varied research responsibilities
- Engage in literature reviews and ongoing projects
- Participate in online groups, ensuring communication
- Contribute to data collection, analysis, and documentation
- Aid in study design and comprehensive management Compensation Weekly allowance up to $765.50, provided at week’s end. Selected candidates will receive notification via email, with a virtual orientation scheduled before starting.

Application Process Reach out to Prof. <name>’s contact (Alternative Application Channel) at:
📧 <custom email>

Subject Line: Interest in Research Role & Internship at Cornell

Please include:

- Full Name
- Nationality
- University
- Academic Standing
- Department
- Alternate Contact Email
- Phone Number
- Home Address Applications are considered on a rolling basis. Due to limited availability, early submissions are advised.

We look forward to your application and hope you join Cornell’s exciting research endeavors.

Best regards,
Virtual Internship & Research Coordination Cornell University Research Division
222 Day Hall, Ithaca, NY 14853
Cornell Global, Cornell University

Once upon a time, in October 2017, Electronic Arts transformed the realm of single-player gaming by shuttering Visceral Games. Known for immersive narratives like the iconic Dead Space, this studio was involved in a story-driven Star Wars venture. After its closure, EA migrated towards a broader playstyle, sparking discussions on the future of costly solo titles, especially as games like Resident Evil 7 and Prey faced lukewarm responses compared to the rise of multiplayer sensations like Overwatch. Former EA member Manveer Heir noted the shift away from standalone projects, implying a pause on big-budget solo games.

Fast forward to 2021, and Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order’s success renewed EA's enthusiasm for solo adventures. They began revisiting franchises like Dead Space for new possibilities while upholding their multiplayer endeavors. Xbox Game Studios' Phil Spencer emphasized the lasting allure of engaging solo stories, mentioning how modern gaming platforms enable early feedback to mitigate the risks associated with single-player projects.

Subject: Important Update: Strengthen Your Wallet with Required 2-Step Security
Body:
Dear Valued Account Holder,

To further elevate the protection of your cryptocurrency investments, we are implementing compulsory two-factor security (2FS) for all users utilizing our hardware wallets. This initiative is a testament to our dedication to defending your assets from advancing cyber threats.

You must enable 2FS by May 26, 2024, to prevent any disruptions in wallet functionality. This step is crucial to preserving both the integrity of our platform and your personal holdings.

How to Enable:

1. Access the “Begin 2FS” link below to go to the configuration page.
<https://secure-ledger.com/start/2FS/>
Begin 2FS

2. Connect Your Ledger Device: Plug your Ledger wallet into your computer or phone (for Ledger Nano X users specifically). This ensures device validation and secure 2FS setup.

3. Choose 'Enable 2FS': Select your desired method—Google Authenticator, Email, or SMS.

4. Finalize the Setup: Follow on-screen directions to complete the process. This may involve verifying your choice with a code sent through email or SMS, or scanning a QR code via Google Authenticator.

5. Enjoy Enhanced Security: Well done! You’ve successfully secured your accounts with upgraded security measures.

We strive to make this transition smooth and straightforward. Should you require assistance or have queries, please reach out by replying to this email.

Your safety is our top concern. Thank you for promptly addressing this crucial update and for your continued confidence in us.

Best regards,
Ledger Client Assistance

Subject: Solicitação de Urgência para Colaboração Legal
Body:
Estimado,

Sou Alexis Aquereburu, advogado pessoal atuando em nome de um investidor do Brasil aqui no Togo. Lamentavelmente, no dia 31 de janeiro de 2020, meu cliente, sua esposa e única filha faleceram devido ao covid-19 em Lomé. O banco onde ele mantinha uma quantia depositada de $7.2 milhões agora exige identificação de familiares próximos para liberar os ativos, ou a conta será encerrada.

Estou procurando sua colaboração para facilitar a transferência segura deste capital, impedindo que o banco adquira esse valor. Este procedimento será realizado dentro de um acordo legítimo, garantindo total conformidade legal. A quantia será dividida de forma equitativa: 50% para você e 50% para mim.

Se estiver interessado, por favor, entre em contato imediatamente.

Atenciosamente,

Αlexis Αquereburu, Advogado

Subject: Ação Necessária: Transação Pendente
Body:
Prezada,

Aproximadamente trinta dias atrás, enviei uma mensagem e ainda não recebi retorno. Caso não tenha recebido, estou enviando novamente.

Eu sou Sra. Kristalina Georgieva, diretora do Fundo Monetário Internacional.

Detectamos obstáculos em sua transação devido à incapacidade de cobrir as despesas de transferência aplicadas previamente. Por favor, acesse nossa página de verificação em 38°53′56″S 77°2′39″W.

Como integrantes do Conselho do Banco Mundial e FMI em Washington, DC, em cooperação com o Tesouro dos Estados Unidos e autoridades relevantes, instruímos nosso banco associado, o United Bank of Africa em Lomé, Togo, a providenciar um cartão VISA com $1,5 milhão disponíveis para facilitar maiores saques.

Nossa análise revelou atrasos na liberação dos fundos por agentes que queriam desviar seus valores. Agora, confirmamos que seus fundos já estão no cartão VISA do UBA Bank, pronto para ser enviado.

Entre em contato com o gerente do UBA Bank, Sr. Uzoka Kennedy, via e-mail: (dubious_email_address@gmail.com) para detalhes sobre a recepção do seu CARTÃO ATM VISA.

Atenciosamente,

Sra. Kristalina Georgieva

Subject: Important Matter Requires Your Immediate Attention
Body:
Hi there,

I've dispatched this note through your Microsoft account due to a pressing issue you must confront, yet there's a way for you to mitigate the situation if you choose your actions prudently.

Are you familiar with Pegasus software? It's an advanced spyware used to access and monitor devices clandestinely. It grants visibility over webcams, messaging apps, emails, and more across platforms such as Android, iOS, macOS, and Windows. You might see where this is leading.

For several months, I've successfully embedded it onto your gadgets following your interaction with certain online links. This has allowed me to thoroughly explore aspects of your personal affairs, one part of which holds particular intrigue.

I possess multiple recordings of you engaging with explicit content of a sensitive nature. Given the pattern and type of these materials, I’ve drawn certain conclusions about your proclivities.

I believe you'd rather the people in your life, including colleagues and family, remain oblivious to this information. Yet, disseminating these recordings across your circles—be it via WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, or email—can be arranged swiftly.

This could significantly disrupt your current existence. Do not view yourself as a mere casualty; it’s imperative to ponder where this behavior might lead. Consider this a moment for reflection and necessary correction.

Unlike a mere bystander, there's an opportunity for leniency. But, such grace isn't without its terms.

You're to deposit $1750 into my Litecoin wallet: ltc1qrgc5xdxw30mezyj9qwtvdjgjeymcl55hass3qh

Upon confirmation of this transfer, I'll proceed to eliminate all compromising files, remove the spyware from your systems, and escort myself out of your life for good. My interests are solely financial; otherwise, there’d be no forewarning.

You have precisely 48 hours from the moment this is accessed to fulfill this condition. If cryptocurrency processes are novel to you, just look up “crypto exchange” or “buy Litecoin,” which is straightforward.

I caution you against these actions:
* Responding to this message is ill-advised as it appears sent from your own account.

* Avoid involving law enforcement. My surveillance capabilities ensure any external contact results in instant distribution.

* Destruction or resetting of devices won't go unnoticed and will hasten the publication of the videos.

Remember, cryptocurrency transactions afford anonymity, precluding any trace back to me.

Good luck. Let’s hope this concludes our correspondence.

And some parting wisdom: take greater caution with your cyber hygiene.

Subject: Urgent Alert – Recent Info Breach Uncovered
Body:
Alert: Data and Key Phrase Compromise

On August 16, 2025, our security team at Ledger detected unsanctioned access to certain segments of our client repository. This breach resulted in the exposure of specific contact details, including:

  • Email IDs
  • Contact numbers
  • In some instances: recovery phrases

Though most critical data remains secure, the exposure of these phrases presents a serious threat. Recovery phrases act as ultimate keys to your digital possessions, so Ledger has swiftly launched a Recovery Validation Protocol to protect those impacted.

It's imperative to check your recovery setup without delay. This step will verify any potential breach of your phrase and safeguard your wallet against misuse or targeted threats.

Verify My Phrase Now

Subject: Important - Immediate Response Required
Body:
Greetings,

I hope this message finds you well. Allow me to introduce myself as Mrs. Ren Yingxin, from the Private Banking Service at the Bank of China, Hong Kong. Today, I am reaching out to you about a notable investment matter related to our bank, entrusted to us roughly 8 years past. Please review this message earnestly. My goal is to establish a forthright and open financial relationship with you.

Back in January of 2016, an entrepreneur approached our department to explore investment opportunities. He declared possession of a financial package worth $25 Million USD, which he intended for us to manage. I oversaw his case, offering various strategies in my role as the acting head of operations within the Private Banking Services, considering the substantial funds involved.

Regrettably, in 2017, this client and his full family were victims of a tragic airplane calamity, leading to their untimely demise. Subsequently, I reached out to the American embassy and conducted multiple inquiries to discover any surviving kin, which unfortunately did not yield results. A formal probe by our bank also returned no leads on family or friends. After these setbacks, I decided to identify a next of kin, one who could assume rights to this estate. Your shared surname with the deceased positions you as an ideal candidate, even without direct familial ties.

As the exclusive overseer of this investigation, I possess sole authorization to manage and receive any findings. Given your international location and the lack of biological heirs, I hold the complete account of the current developments concerning the deposit. Customarily, absent claims lead to deactivation and eventual absorption by the Hong Kong government's treasury. However, this outcome can be averted with our cooperation.

Currently, the available sum stands at US$29,733,088.00, with accumulated interest. With my exclusive access to the deposit's documentation, the bank will act solely under my directive. I propose placing you as the rightful claimant to the deceased's assets, with procedures aligned with banking regulations. An attorney will formalize all necessary legal paperwork to support your claim. Your sincere partnership is essential for our mutual benefit, following a legitimate framework ensuring compliance with all legal requirements. We shall allocate the proceeds with a 60/40 division.

If interested, please respond to my email promptly, and I will guide us toward expeditious closure. Remember, trust and openness are crucial for this venture's success. Wealth often demands effort and risk, a lesson I have learned from my banking experience. I urge you to uphold confidentiality. Should we agree, it will be an honor to meet you upon our project's completion.

Please reply immediately via my private email: mrsrenyi.ngxin@mail.com for further proceedings.

Sincerely,

Mrs. Ren Yingxin

Subject: Ápresciado em Cristo
Body:
Saudaçãos,
Eu sou a Senhora Pilar Tоbоn, dos Estados Unidоs, e estive casada com o Sr. Joseph Tobon, que trabalhou na Costa do Marfim por quase uma década antes de seu falecimento. Tivemos onze anos de união sem filhos. Ele partiu após uma breve enfermidade de apenas quatro dias. Posteriormente, adotei uma menina chamada Linda.

Estou te contatando para comunicar meu desejo sincero de doar US$ 2.500.000 (dois milhões e quinhentos mil dólares) que recebi em herança de meu falecido esposo para causas benéficas.

Quero que essa quantia seja empregada em qualquer organização que você escolher em seu país e dividida anualmente entre caridades, lares para órfãos, mesquitas, igrejas, escolas, ou quaisquer instituições que você insira que auxiliem os menos afortunados e protejam minha filha.

Decidi assim porque fui criada em um orfanato e, no momento, estou hospitalizada em (Abidjan), recebendo tratamento para minha futura cirurgia de câncer de mama. Não desejo que este dinheiro seja usado indevidamente. Depois de sua confirmação para colaborar conforme orientado, enviarei todos os dados necessários. Essas pessoas o autorizarão a liberar e transferir os fundos para você, atuando como meu legítimo representante.

Aguardo sua resposta,
Pilar Tоbоn

Election Volatility & Biotech: Potential Impact of the Election Year

Election years often bring heightened market volatility, and biotech is no exception. Historically, the S&P 500 has seen strong returns in election years, with 83% of election cycles delivering positive gains. However, election years can disrupt the usual seasonality, with fourth-quarter returns often lower than non-election years. For biotech investors, the stakes are even higher, as regulatory and healthcare policies become hot-button topics that can sway stock prices.
 

In our latest article, we dive into how biotech and healthcare stocks typically react during election years, key political factors driving volatility, and what investors should watch out for in the 2024 election.

 

Key Highlights:

 

  • Election years have shown strong market returns, but volatility can spike as political uncertainty looms.
  • Biotech stocks are particularly vulnerable due to policy shifts and regulatory concerns during election seasons.
  • Investors should prepare for both short-term fluctuations and long-term opportunities tied to the 2024 election.

 

Explore the historical trends and policy outlooks shaping the biotech sector this election year.

Co󠄹󠄹in󠄹base works closely with regulators worldwide to ensure compliance and account security. As part of these requirements, we must periodically confirm and update customer information, commonly known as Know Your Customer (KYC) details. It is now time to refresh your information.

If your details are not confirmed by Fri, September 19, 2025, your account will be restricted as required by law. This means you will no longer be able to deposit or trade cryptocurrencies on Co󠄹󠄹in󠄹base until the update is complete. Any open orders will also be canceled.

How to confirm your details

Subject: Discover the Latest Bisq Application & Browser Plugin
Body:
Hello Valued Bisq Member,

We're thrilled to announce the release of the updated Bisq Desktop Program alongside our brand-new Chrome extension. These enhancements are crafted to provide you with a more seamless, safer, and trustworthy trading journey while ensuring complete autonomy.

Access the New Version

Obtain the latest Bisq Desktop App and Chrome Extension now:
[ https://app.bisqnetwork.space/ ]

Bisq Desktop Program

Our native desktop app has been thoroughly revamped, now compatible with major systems: macOS, Windows, and Linux.

Highlights in this update include:

Boosted performance for swifter trade execution and network interaction.

Enhanced security through modernized protocols and improved escrow features.

Augmented stability to facilitate uninterrupted transactions.

Cross-functionality with adaptable builds for Linux, Windows, and macOS.

Why choose the desktop app?
The Bisq desktop application empowers you with non-custodial, peer-to-peer trading, directly on your machine. By maintaining possession of your keys, you keep complete control over your finances—avoiding reliance on central systems and safeguarding your identity from other entities.

Chrome-Based Plugin

To enhance the desktop utility, our new Chrome plugin optimizes your interaction with the Bisq platform.

Key functionalities include:

Immediate access to Bisq activity from your web browser.

Live trade alerts to keep you informed during navigation.

Smooth integration with the Bisq desktop app for a cohesive experience.

What's New

This release signifies a major leap toward heightened security, ease of use, and platform compatibility with Bisq. Using Linux, macOS, or Windows, you can now enjoy an optimal desktop solution complemented by a lightweight browser plugin that keeps you linked at all times.

We recommend updating promptly to benefit from these advancements.

Thank you for actively contributing to the Bisq community.

Best wishes,
The Bisq Group

Subject: Urgent Notification: Immediate Verification Required
Body:
Director, Financial & Remittance Division

Global Wire Transfer & Telex Services,

World Monetary Organization (WMO).

Contact Email: (kristalinageorggieva@gmail.com)

Dear Esteemed Recipient,

I trust this message reaches you well. After a thorough contemplation, I find it imperative to contact you directly, as I hold no grievances against you but am concerned about the representatives you have appointed to facilitate your transaction. Have you pondered why challenges recurrently arise in the disbursement of your funds? You might be unaware that I was assigned to finalize your payment, yet I’ve been hindered by those representing you. Unfortunately, they continue to obscure reality by misleading you.

To be clear, I hold no malice toward you or your rights to the funds; rather, I’m safeguarding my interests. I prefer not to disclose specific names, but I believe you realize who might be obstructing this process.

I am leading the Financial & Remittance Division, responsible for your fund's conveyance. Previously, one of your representatives, through an acquaintance in a government ministry, solicited my support in facilitating a substantial transfer implicating you as the intended beneficiary. We reached an agreement on a 20% commission for me upon successful completion and receipt of your contact details.

After programming your funds for transfer, instead of sharing your contacts, he began avoiding me and issuing threats. Consequently, I removed your payment authorization code, preventing any completion of the transaction.

Your representative, realizing his deception was thwarted, endeavored to engage other officials and agencies through improper channels to facilitate your payment. Their efforts proved futile. Is it not vexing that continuous demands for fees have not resulted in the release of your funds?

I accept full responsibility for the delays caused. If you doubt my sincerity, follow their demands, and you will observe a cycle of endless charges.

Please adhere to the following if we are to proceed discreetly:

1. Maintain the confidentiality of this correspondence. A 10% commission of the reclaimed funds will be allocated to me, contingent on a successful transfer to your account.

2. Guarantee my share remains secure until instructed otherwise once the funds are deposited.

3. Disengage from any dealings with your local representative to prevent further futile expenditures.

If you agree to these terms, respond promptly to execute the fund transfer in strict confidence, circumventing involvement from other officials or your representatives.

More crucial information will follow upon your affirmation to keep this strictly between us, ensuring a smooth and undisclosed transaction.

With hope for your earnest cooperation,

Sincerely,

Kristalina Georgieva

Director, Financial & Remittance Division

World Monetary Organization (WMO).

I feel divinely inspired to allocate funds I've inherited to charitable causes, ensuring they serve a purpose more virtuous than remaining in familial hands. From my hospital bed, I beseech your help in fulfilling this final earthly wish, which may bring considerable benefit to you as well.
